diagrams.title: String Case Conversion Flow
diagrams.description: Diagram showing how toLowerCase() and toUpperCase() transform strings with visual representation of input and output strings
elements: Case conversion logic processes each character
New String object returned with transformed case
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrate that case conversion creates new strings and preserves immutability

diagrams.title: Turkish Locale Case Conversion Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison of default vs Turkish locale conversion showing the İ/i/ı characters
elements: Default conversion incorrectly maps Turkish 'i' to 'I'
Correct: Use Locale.TURKISH for Turkish text
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the Turkish locale special case for proper implementation

diagrams.title: Character Extraction Methods Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing various String case and character methods including their relationships
diagrams.purpose: Show how case conversion fits into broader String manipulation methods
